# TaxSort

> TaxSort is an AI-powered mobile app for freelancers and self-employed individuals to manage taxes effortlessly.

## What is TaxSort?
TaxSort helps freelancers, independent contractors, gig workers, and self-employed individuals manage their taxes year-round. The app uses AI to scan receipts, track mileage via GPS, automatically categorize expenses into tax-authority-approved categories, and generate audit-ready PDF/CSV reports. Supports CRA (Canada), IRS (USA), HMRC (UK), and ATO (Australia).

## Key Features
- AI receipt scanning: Snap a photo of any receipt and AI reads, categorizes, and stores it instantly — extracts subtotal, HST/GST/sales tax, and total as separate fields
- GPS mileage tracking: Automatically track business trips and calculate deductions using CRA and IRS mileage rates
- Smart expense categorization: AI sorts expenses into CRA and IRS-approved tax categories
- HST/GST tracking: Captures tax paid on every receipt; Canadian users get a total HST/GST paid summary for Input Tax Credit (ITC) claims
- Audit-ready export: Generate professional PDF, CSV, and ZIP reports for accountants in one tap; PDF includes a dedicated Tax/HST column per expense
- Secure cloud backup: All data encrypted and backed up 24/7
- Real-time savings tracker: See estimated tax savings update live
- Multiple business profiles: Manage expenses for multiple businesses from one app
- Deduction Health Score: AI-powered score showing how optimized your deductions are

## Who is TaxSort for?
- Freelancers and independent contractors
- Gig workers (Uber, Lyft, DoorDash, Instacart drivers)
- Self-employed consultants and coaches
- Realtors and real estate agents
- Small business owners
- Anyone who needs to track business expenses for taxes in the US, Canada, UK, or Australia

## Pricing
- Free plan: 10 AI receipt scans/month, basic expense categories, manual expense entry, basic tax summary, CSV export — $0 forever
- Pro plan: $44.99/year (USD), billed annually — equivalent to $3.75/month. Includes unlimited AI receipt scanning, unlimited bank & CSV imports, unlimited PDF/CSV/ZIP exports, full tax summary & transaction history, multiple business profiles, Deduction Health Score, AI tax tips on every receipt.

## Tax Support
- Canada: CRA-approved tax categories, T2125 compatible, HST/GST amount tracked per receipt, total HST/GST paid shown for ITC claims
- United States: IRS-approved tax categories, Schedule C compatible, sales tax captured per receipt as part of expense total
- United Kingdom: HMRC-approved categories, Self Assessment SA103F compatible, VAT tracked per receipt, mileage at AMAP rates (45p/mile first 10,000 miles, 25p/mile after)
- Australia: ATO-approved categories, myTax compatible, GST tracked per receipt for BAS claims, mileage at ATO cents-per-kilometre rate

## Platforms
- iOS (App Store)
- Android (Google Play)
- Web (taxsort.app/dashboard)

TaxSort publishes tax guides for freelancers and self-employed workers:
- How Uber drivers can save on taxes
- How realtors can save on taxes
- Top 15 tax deductions every freelancer should know
- Complete guide to mileage deductions
- Home office deduction guide
- Gig worker taxes in the US (2025)
- Gig worker taxes in Canada (2025–2026)
- How to never lose a business receipt again
- 7 tax mistakes freelancers make
